pr.title: Medical dashboard HomeScreen workspace
pr.body: ## Summary ### Home (`HomeScreen.kt`) - Medical dashboard with welcome totals, quick stats, appointments timeline ### Dashboard (`DashboardScreen.kt`) - Stacked claim allocation bar + provider spending progress trackers ### CPT analytics (`CptCountScreen.kt`) — new - Horizontal **FilterChip** row for all `CptCategory` entries (selected: `#2498EA`) - `remember(records, selectedCategory)` groups matching `EobCharge` rows by CPT code - **LazyColumn** table: code/description, frequency count, billed total - Empty state when no charges match category ## Test plan - [ ] CPT tab: switch categories via chips; list updates - [ ] Rows show correct count and summed `billedAmount` per code - [ ] Home and Dashboard tabs still function
pr.author: ljduhart
